company_description: Business description: Itissalat Al-Maghrib (IAM) S.A. Maroc Telecom is Morocco's No. 1 telecommunications operator. Net sales (including intra-group) break down by activity as follows: - mobile telephony (72.4%): 19.2 million customers in Morocco at the end of 2025, distributed between customers with prepaid cards (16.5 million) and with post-paid subscriptions (2.8 million). At the end of 2025, the group owned 11,071 base stations; - fixed telephony and Internet (27.6%): fixed telephony services (1.6 million lines installed in Morocco as of the end of 2025), interconnection services, data transmission, and Internet access (1,419,000 subscribers). Products and services are marketed through a network of 377 owned branches, more than 70,000 group-approved points of sale (tobacconists, local shops, etc.) and independent distribution channels. 50.6% of net sales (including intra-group) are abroad. Number of employees: 8,758
